testcase.name: returns undefined when timeoutSec is not set and no explicit toolTimeout
returns the explicit toolTimeout unchanged when no run-level timeoutSec
returns undefined for a tool not in toolTimeouts when no timeoutSec

testsuite.name: computeToolBudgetTimeout — T7: budget-derived timeout (no explicit toolTimeouts)

testcase.name: returns 80% of remaining budget when timeoutSec is set and no explicit entry
testcase.classname: computeToolBudgetTimeout — T7: budget-derived timeout (no explicit toolTimeouts)

testcase.name: accounts for elapsed time in the remaining budget calculation
testcase.classname: computeToolBudgetTimeout — T7: budget-derived timeout (no explicit toolTimeouts)

testcase.name: enforces minimum of 5s even with very small remaining budget
testcase.classname: computeToolBudgetTimeout — T7: budget-derived timeout (no explicit toolTimeouts)

testcase.name: enforces maximum of 5 minutes (300_000ms) per tool from the budget
testcase.classname: computeToolBudgetTimeout — T7: budget-derived timeout (no explicit toolTimeouts)

testcase.name: returns 1ms (exhaust signal) when budget is already spent
testcase.classname: computeToolBudgetTimeout — T7: budget-derived timeout (no explicit toolTimeouts)

testsuite.name: computeToolBudgetTimeout — T8: explicit toolTimeout capped at remaining budget

testcase.name: uses explicit timeout when it is less than the budget cap
testcase.classname: computeToolBudgetTimeout — T8: explicit toolTimeout capped at remaining budget

testcase.name: caps explicit timeout at budgetCap when explicit > budget
testcase.classname: computeToolBudgetTimeout — T8: explicit toolTimeout capped at remaining budget

testcase.name: caps at minimum 5_000 even when explicit < 5_000 would have been chosen by budget
testcase.classname: computeToolBudgetTimeout — T8: explicit toolTimeout capped at remaining budget

testcase.name: different tools get independent timeouts from the budget
testcase.classname: computeToolBudgetTimeout — T8: explicit toolTimeout capped at remaining budget

testcase.name: accepts startMs + nowMs instead of elapsedMs
elapsedMs takes precedence over startMs when both are provided
